purpose: Product and dependency update backlog for Unica bundled tools, plugin package dependencies, and release-package inputs.

products.notes: Updated to v0.2.62 after reviewing v0.2.56 through v0.2.62, including the issue #7 extension-analysis implementation. The refresh brings extension-topology and diagnostics fixes plus named-connection metadata work; Unica continues to consume only typed unica.code.* graph/diagnostics gates. It does not expose connection, event-log, execute, debug, rename, or fix-all capabilities. Dependency-aware CFE topology remains deferred until v8-runner #32 provides its shared configuration contract.

Updated together with rlm-bsl-index to v1.26.0. v1.26.0 keeps index BUILDER_VERSION=14, fixes Windows full rebuild under an open reader, adds regex-DoS guards, removes false callers from multiline literals, adds find_files FS fallback on index zero-hit, and normalizes parse_metadata_xml to dict|None; raw RLM helper guidance remains hidden from skills.

v1.26.0 release states index schema and BUILDER_VERSION remain 14, so production index rebuild is not required. Contract gates verify build/info/update, schema tables used by Unica SQL, and generated package launchers.
Updated tools.lock.json to v0.5.1 after reviewing the version command and partial-load/build changes; Unica MCP contract remains typed and unchanged.
Source pin is current; local interpreter may still have 6.1.0 until test requirements are installed.
Applied compatible lock-only updates: cc 1.2.64 -> 1.2.65, log 0.4.32 -> 0.4.33, quote 1.0.45 -> 1.0.46, and rustls 0.23.40 -> 0.23.41; direct major updates stay out of this batch.
serde_yaml is deprecated, but replacing the YAML parser is a direct dependency migration rather than a lock refresh; defer to a separate focused PR with v8project.yaml fixture coverage.
ureq 3.3.0 requires Rust 1.85. The repo does not currently publish an MSRV, so the dependency stays on ureq 2.12.1 until Rust 1.85 support is an explicit release-policy decision.
